title: Amtech N0150 Toolbox, 23-Inch
features: DURABLE: This 585mm (23") metal tool box has a heavy duty steel top lid panel and two metal latch closures for durability
VERSATILE: With an easy-grip carrying handle, a removable inner tool tray and two metal latch closures, it is ideal for storing tools and other items
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
TIME SAVING: Enhances productivity through fast and accurate cutting
description: From the manufacturer Why Amtech? Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your hand tools requirements. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Amtech N0150 Toolbox The N0150 Toolbox has 30-litre storage capacity. This toolbox can be used for trade, a hobby, DIY, and other crafts. Thanks to its compartments, the owner can easily organize, carry, and store their tools and accessories with ease. You can keep your tools and items safe via its two metal latch closures. On the top side, you will find heavy-duty steel lid panel with padlock eye hole fitted to the lid. It has an easy-grip handle so you can carry the toolbox anywhere you want with ease. Easy grip carrying handle for greater comfort Ideal for storing tools and accessories Removable inner tool tray Heavy-duty steel top lid panel Two metal latch closures Padlock eye hole fitted to the lid for additional security
